dict.string: Voxhora controls Mail.app to send your client emails from your legal practice email address and to scan your inbox for court appointment emails (saving any attached PDFs to Downloads for automatic client intake). Without this permission, Voxhora's email send falls back to your default account and the inbox agent cannot run.
Voxhora syncs your client roster to Apple Contacts (one-way only) so phone numbers, addresses, and emails appear automatically across iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Apple Watch.

Voxhora listens to your voice when you tap the Speak chip in Bill Time, transcribes it on-device, and turns it into a billable entry. Without this permission, voice billing is disabled and you'd have to type each entry manually.

Voxhora uses Apple's on-device speech recognition to turn what you say into a billable entry. Recognition runs locally — your audio never leaves your Mac. Without this permission, voice billing is disabled.
